items.title: Budget boosts long-term outlook for Dixon, Kaynes Tech, other EMS stocks, say brokerages
items.description: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman announced a sharp increase in the allocation for the Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS) to Rs 40,000 crore.

items.title: Will Budget 2026 deter foreign investors even more? Here's what analysts say
items.description: 'Long-term allocators still view India favourably within emerging markets, but near-term foreign flows are expected to remain volatile until global interest rate conditions ease,' an analyst said.

items.title: Taking Stock: Markets recover after Budget day selloff; Sensex rises 944 pts, Nifty ends near 25,100
